scripts.check: node --check script.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('data/projects.json','utf8')); const files=['assets/portfolio/works-heading.png','assets/portfolio/gallery-heading.png','assets/portfolio/about-heading.png','assets/portfolio/contact-heading.png',...p.flatMap(x=>x.screenshots||[])]; const forbidden=['assets/projects/insight-studio-real.png']; const missing=files.filter(f=>!fs.existsSync(f)); const leaked=forbidden.filter(f=>fs.existsSync(f)); if(missing.length||leaked.length){console.error({missing, leaked}); process.exit(1)} console.log('projects json and assets ok')"
